_comment: Repo-side overrides for the terminal picker, maintained by hand (no master-DB edit needed). 'names' map a PORTMC terminal matchcode to a friendly label. 'modes' force a port's picker mode (terminal|ssy) over the auto value in portmc.json. 'addTerminals' append terminals not in the master PORTMC. 'notes' show a caveat line in the result for that POL.

notes.USLAX: ICTF timing varies (on-dock vs off-dock) and isn't differentiated yet — verify with the desk. Off-dock ICTF routes technically as USLGB (UNIONP 090).
